name: llm-guard-kit
summary: Real-time reliability monitoring for LLM agents. v0.16.0: hosted calibration endpoint (POST /v2/calibrate/fit), multilevel feature engineering (L1-L4+L5 semantic), 3-domain validation (code/SQL/CS), latency SLA benchmark (behavioral p50=19ms), L1 behavioral cross-domain AUROC 0.770 on real HP→TV chains. v0.15.0: probe_ensemble_blend() helper (+1.6pp cross-domain AUROC), corrected LSTM AUROC (0.545 not 0.8280).
author: Avighan Majumder
